title: Worstenbroodjes
description: Adds worstenbroodjes to the game as a craftable dutch food item
body:
![Worstenbroodje crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3e81df291602233208cdcd497591c87a0d3564.png)
![Bossche bol crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34b559cdbb7f1a6487c7e81276059374820b0211.png)
![Kaneelstok crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e9c6807d8ff304312651cc788933ea30dd3ce97.png)
# Worstenbroodjes
This simple mod adds worstenbroodjes, Bossche bollen and cinnamon stick candy (kaneelstok) to the game, dutch local brabantian snacks.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aw3mJexDX5Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

1 worstenbroodje will fill just slightly less of your hunger bar than a steak, although the saturation levels are better.

1 Bossche bol fills a small amount of hunger, but for the cheap recipe it's a good deal!

Cinnamon stick candy doesn't fill much, but it's a nice snack to have for fun.
(Bossche bol and cinnamon stick are only in version 2.0 of the mod)

### Language support
Multiple languages have custom names for worstenbroodjes
- English: Worstenbroodje
- Nederlands: Worstenbroodje
- Braobans: Worstebrooike
- Frysk: Woarst roll

### Dependencies
Fabric API (only for the fabric versions)

### Future plans
If you have any suggestions, quesions or problems please let me know on twitter: @Didierman95
